name: Scala 3 Development
initializeCommand: find . -type d -name .scala-build -prune -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true; mkdir -p .metals .bsp target project/target && chmod -R u+rwX . 2>/dev/null || true
postCreateCommand: cd /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer && START_METALS_MCP=0 bash .devcontainer/post-start.sh && node --version && npm --version && codex --version && scala-cli --version && scala3-compiler -version && sbt -Dsbt.batch=true update sbtVersion && bash .devcontainer/post-start.sh
